Text: Owned the product release operations from managing Git repository to building, testing, and maintaining blue-green deployments, with semi-weekly deployments including product iterations, feature enhancements, and bug fixes.

Directed technical team coordination across a multidisciplinary engineering department through expectation setting, solution development, performance monitoring, technical documentation, and project prioritization, across 5 team members.

Modernized the release management from a manual repository to an automated, centralized, dynamic tool using ASP Core and C#, enabling advancements such as pipeline monitoring, backport requests, and simplified release processing.

Developed parsing and validation capability to ensure syntax and configuration integrity while integrating with Azure DevOps utilizing C# and PowerShell, proactively minimizing risk and maximizing product reliability.

Transformed the automated notification experience by eliminating manual vendor-based, process-driven scripting through integrating declarative template-driven processes, improving onboarding notification efficiency by 80%.
Provided pipeline development and maintenance support as a technical team lead and product expert.

Matured a local network infrastructure by building, implementing, maintaining, and managing the virtual private network (VPN), Windows Deployment server, and Windows Update server for a local afterschool program, serving 100+ recurring active users.

Scaled technical and development capabilities through end-to-end software configuration and integration for notable launches, such as creating and implementing an Active Directory site and automating computer deployment processes.
Created an extensive computer curriculum including program conceptualization, content creation, assessment building, and delivery design, serving students between the ages of 8 and 14.

Managed lab technology system including new software deployment, quality testing, technical support, system maintenance, and daily oversight, as a trusted partner with professors and university IT department.
